architecture.summary: User provided exact file locations, line numbers, and execution order fix for init.ts and repo-connect.ts

integrations.summary: Wire clone-repos to umbrella auto-setup via cloneReposIntoWorkspace and scanUmbrellaRepos, chain to syncSetupCommand

ui-ux.summary: New promptProjectSetup option, updated next-steps messaging for multi-repo

edge-cases.summary: CI/non-interactive skip, partial clone failure handling, single-repo unchanged behavior

security.summary: No security concerns - internal CLI init flow

performance.summary: No performance concerns - one-time init command
